Off Calendar Jun-09-2005 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-18-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-21-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Ms. Fairbairn, Esq. for Plaintiff: HOTBAR.COM
No appearance by the Defendant: LEGALMATCH.COM.
Plaintiff's witness: Angel Ortez, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant for the money judgment in total of $7,103.60
Counsel to submit proposed Judgment for signuture.

Jan. 20, 2004
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.
Judgment granted as follows:
Damages $5,855.40
Prejudgment Interest $435.20
Attorney's Fees $660.00
Costs $153.00 for a total of $7,103.60
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2004 Set For Trial On Jan-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
